subcodes.first_line: O leaf of the Tree of Holiness! Thine illustrious son hath soared, even as the birds of sanctity, to the highest heaven, winging his flight unto the Abhá Paradise
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه شجره تقدیس سلیل جلیل مانند طیور قدس اوج اعلی گرفت و بفردوس ابهی پرواز
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @consolation and comfort, @angels, @eulogies; reminiscences, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
